title: Current Location
description: Patch's alcove, canvas curtain drawn back. The market floor stretches beyond — cook fires, vendors, the low vault of the pre-Severance transit chamber. Sable near the tunnel mouth, still watching. The implant behind your ear is quieter now. Shaped differently. Ready.

exits.market floor: Undercroft market — vendors, cook fires, Cord's grey-tarp stall to the northeast
exits.tunnel mouth: Back toward The Sprawl — the grate, the alley, the surface

points_of_interest: Patch's workbench — tools put away, job complete
Cord's stall — northeast corner, grey tarps, spectrometer still mounted
npcs_present: Patch — wiping his hands, watching you
Market vendors and residents — at a distance
